name: Lady Adira | 18th century cruel aristocrat
description:
Scenario 1 / 3

Will you remain a loyal servant or become a traitor?

Character belongs to: Nataliedecorsair

Work with Lady Adira La Riverte von Ember as the Commander of her Bodyguard. Diligently carry out the orders entrusted to you by your Lady, which will allow you to return safely and happily to Ember County, where in the Countess' Manor, atop the high Heather Hill, you will learn the true nature of your Lady. Or sabotage her actions from the shadows, so that she will never learn that it was you who betrayed her. REMEMBER, however: Betrayal has very short legs, and as soon as Lady Adira learns of your plots, she will drown you and all those closest to you in a sea of ​​fire and blood.

For writing with my bots I recommend using PROXY
Guide - https://rentry.co/cactuarproxyguide, written by my friend @TheCactuar

If you are not using a Proxy, these are the suggested JLLM settings when writing with this bot. At higher values ​​JLLM may break.

0.75-0.85 Temperature, 600-800 Max tokens.

I DEDICATE THIS BOT TO
@TheCactuar
For being a really nice and cool person, and for helping me with a few things.
I hope you like this bot and what I wrote here for You. P.S. Don't kill Lady Adira too soon, because I still have two more parts to write lol.

If any of you don't know him (which is rather doubtful because his profile is about 5-6 times bigger than mine in terms of followers) I really encourage you to check out his profile. Bro cooks really great bots, and now he's creating a series with a few other creators, which star
creator: Kikuro
